creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
Sorry bsam,
but the problem is not the extra @freebsd.org.
The problem is that I sent this pr after this one
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=155280
filed on March 5th and still there as anders@ looks disappeared since a long 
time.
I also posted a message in the ports mailing list asking if he is supposed to 
be still active.
Maybe the ports he maintains should be reassigned.
